content.en:
Not long after Ye Tian came out, a strong man appeared in front of him.

"Respected secret master, are you interested in chatting?"

The strong man said.

Ye Tian judged that this man was a strong man of the 27th heaven, and he was definitely from a top force.

"What do you mean?" Ye Tian asked.

The man did not beat around the bush and said, "You can refine a low-level heavy palace golden elixir with 100% purity. We in the Blood God Temple want to invite you to join."

"What if I don't join?"

Ye Tian asked back.

He knew a little about the Blood God Temple. The seventh-ranked force in Wanzhong Mountain was much stronger than the Wanjiao Society.

The Blood God Temple had an existence above the 30th heaven. It could destroy the Wanjiao Society by sending a strong man at random.

"If you don't join, you will die!"

The strong man threatened.

"Sorry, I'm not interested in joining the Blood God Temple!" Ye Tian refused directly. If he really joined the Blood God Temple, he would definitely be controlled and would not have any freedom.

Although he was sure to get rid of the Blood God Temple, he would not compromise.

So, he would not agree to the other party's invitation.

At this moment, he could also guess that it was Gui Lao who betrayed him, but he thought it was normal. People like Gui Lao were willing to trade anything for the sake of profit, and naturally they would trade their information. This was normal.

"Looking for death!"

The strong man was ready to capture Ye Tian directly.

Others did not dare to take action in the Ancient City of Baiyue, but he was not afraid. The mayor of the Ancient City of Baiyue did not dare to take action against him.

In an instant.

This space was shrouded by a terrifying force.

"Eightfold Blood God Realm!"

This is an emperor-level Chonggong secret method. He practiced it to the great success realm and directly pulled Ye Tian into the Eightfold Blood God Realm.

But the next moment, a blood blade pierced through his eight-layer blood god realm and body.

This was the ultimate Chonggong secret method used by Ye Tian - the extreme blood blade!

Ye Tian was in the 25th layer, and the opponent was in the 27th layer, but the foundation and Chonggong secret method were too different, so naturally he was far from his opponent.

With one blow, the strong man was killed instantly.

Then.

Ye Tian left quickly, hiding his figure, and the strong men who were staring at Ye Tian lost his trace one after another.

And Ye Tian hid his identity, and now he disappeared, it is not easy for them to find Ye Tian.

"The Yuanxue Zun Envoy of the Blood God Temple was killed instantly by the opponent!!!!"

The old ghost was shocked when he heard the news. He was afraid that Ye Tian would come to trouble him, so he fled immediately and did not dare to stay in the ancient city of Baiyue.

...

Ten Thousand Churches.

After Ye Tian came back, he kept a low profile for a while, and then he collected materials for refining the intermediate heavy palace golden elixir Yunwu Golden Elixir.

In the days that followed, he began to refine Yunwu Golden Elixir.

At the beginning, the purity of the Yunwu Golden Elixir he refined wasNot high, he sold them all, exchanged them for resources, and then bought materials.

Of course.

He did not sell the Cloud Mist Golden Pill in Baiyue Ancient City, but went to other places to sell them. He hid his identity every time, so he did not arouse suspicion and trouble.

After a period of time, the purity of the Cloud Mist Golden Pill he refined could reach more than 95%.

But he was still not satisfied. He would refine a Cloud Mist Golden Pill with a purity of 100% before he would take it himself.

Just like that, another period of time passed.

Ye Tian successfully refined a Cloud Mist Golden Pill with a purity of 100%, and then used the Cloud Mist Golden Pill to improve his cultivation.

The Cloud Mist Golden Pill is helpful to practitioners with cultivation below the 28th level, but he can use the Cloud Mist Golden Pill to advance his cultivation to the 30th level, which should be no problem.

In the following days, his cultivation improved rapidly.

The 26th level!

The 27th level!

After a long time, his cultivation reached the 30th level.

At this level, it was difficult for him to fight across multiple levels, but he estimated that he could deal with ordinary 34th level strongmen.

As for the existence of the 35th and 36th levels, most of them were supreme level Chonggong. His ultimate Chonggong was only one level higher, and it was difficult to kill them across so many levels.

After reaching the 30th level, Ye Tian had to obtain the secret recipe of the advanced Chonggong Jindan, so that he could refine a 100% pure advanced Chonggong Jindan to quickly improve his cultivation.

"If I have a high-level Chonggong Golden Pill with 100% purity, I can quickly advance my cultivation to the 36th level. By then, I will be almost invincible under the Ultimate Palace Master!"

·· ·······Please give me flowers·· ··

Moreover, according to his understanding, if practitioners want to break through to become the Ultimate Palace Master, they must comprehend the rules of the Ultimate Chonggong before they can break through to the Ultimate Chonggong.

·· ·······Please give me flowers·· ··

But it is too difficult to comprehend the rules of the Ultimate Chonggong. At least in Wanchong Mountain, there is no way to comprehend the rules of the Ultimate Chonggong.

But one thing is certain, without the Ultimate Chonggong, there is no qualification to comprehend the rules of the Ultimate Chonggong.

...

Qinjiang Ancient City.

In a mansion.

Gui Lao is enjoying the service of servants.

Suddenly.

The void transformed, and he appeared in an unfamiliar environment.

"Who?"

Gui Lao said in shock.

"Gui Lao, long time no see!"

Ye Tian appeared and came in front of Gui Lao.

... ... ...

... ... ...

At this moment, he was dressed the same way as when he first met Gui Lao.The old ghost naturally recognized him immediately.

"Hello, senior!"

He was very terrified. This was the terrifying killer who killed the Yuanxue Zunshi in seconds. Could it be that he was here to take revenge on him?

"Don't worry, I won't kill you!" Ye Tian said, "I just want to get some information from you."

"Please speak, senior."

The old ghost said.

"Is there an Ultimate Palace Master here in Wanchong Mountain?" Ye Tian asked.

"Yes!" Gui Lao hurriedly introduced: "There are three palace masters in Wanchong Mountain, and they all belong to the first force of Wanchong Mountain, Leiyu Palace. There are three palace masters in Leiyu Palace, all of whom are ultimate palace masters, but the third palace master - Xueji Palace Master, who is currently in charge of Leiyu Palace, and the other two palace masters have long left Leiyu Palace and are nowhere to be found. They should have gone to a distant place!"

"Three ultimate palace masters!"

Ye Tian was a little surprised. He didn't expect that the strength of Wanchong Mountain was quite good!

The strength of the ultimate palace master should correspond to the ultimate supreme master. His time and space line is at the end. If it weren't for the awakening of those ancient demons and ultimate ancient demons, there would be more than a dozen ultimate supreme masters in the time and space line he is in.

Obviously, this time and space line is still in its heyday, no less than the ancient demon era.

Afterwards, Ye Tian asked Gui Lao again. Gui Lao said what he knew, and didn't dare to say anything if he didn't know.

Gradually, Ye Tian got to know more about Wanchong Mountain and many areas of this time and space line. Daodao.
